tasks.label: Agent A: Preview on main worktree
tasks.command: cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble.worktrees/agent-a && git checkout --detach && cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble/ && git checkout ${input:branchNameAgentA}

tasks.label: Agent A: Send back to agent worktree
tasks.command: cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble/ && git checkout develop && cd ~/Developer/projects/ensemble.worktrees/agent-a && git checkout ${input:branchNameAgentA}
